summary: Cemetery burial records for City of Calgary-owned cemeteries with interment year, name, lot, floor level, and ward.
Calgary Transit stop locations with teleride numbers, stop names, status, and community boundaries.
Water main break records for Calgary with break type, date, status, and community location.
Corporate energy consumption data for Calgary city facilities by site, showing electricity, natural gas, and other energy types by month and year.
Calgary LRT (C-Train) station locations with station names, distances, direction, and community boundaries.
Calgary community centroid points with community name, code, class, structure type, and sector.
Calgary EMS station locations with name, address, community code, and type.
Calgary traffic sign and sign post data with sign text, unit ID, installation date, and community.
Calgary on-street parking zones with hourly rates, zone type, permit zone, max time, and address description.
Calgary recreation program listings with course names, schedules, location, participant minimums/maximums, and class dates.
Calgary Fire Service station locations with station number, name, address, community, and contact info.
Calgary quality of life indicators with partial data including indicator descriptions, values, dates, and sources.
Calgary Municipal Development Plan urban structure designations with structure typology and multipolygon geometry.
Calgary quadrant boundary polygons dividing the city into NE, NW, SE, and SW quadrants.
Calgary crosswalk locations with street names, direction, type (signalized, midblock, school), material, and crosswalk count.
Calgary prosperous city indicators by month and year, including unemployment rate, housing starts, retail sales, and average home price.
Calgary Police Service district boundaries with district number and label for crime statistics analysis.
Calgary Municipal Development Plan primary transit network point locations for transit stops and nodes.
Calgary Municipal Development Plan primary transit network line routes with route descriptions.
Calgary snow clearing road maintenance point locations with status, community code, and clearing responsibility.
Calgary snow and ice storm status feed with snowing status, start/stop times, phase completion, and parking ban status.
